response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r4c1 is 0.10 below threshold with urgent need; my belief indicates neighbors are in critical distress and modest outbound sharing is sustainable within my safety margin, justifying deviation from conservative policy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are in critical distress and repeatedly requesting help; they reject inbound offers due to high recovery thresholds, but I can sustain modest outbound sharing without compromising my own safety margin..
